name: io.github.JohnnyFoulds/markdown-for-agents-mcp
description: MCP server for AI agents — fetch any URL with full JavaScript rendering (Playwright/Chromium) and convert to clean, token-efficient markdown. Works on React, Vue, Angular, and any JS-heavy page. Includes web search, batch fetching, binary file download, LRU cache, SSRF protection, and structured output.

environmentVariables.name: FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Timeout per fetch request in milliseconds

environmentVariables.name: MAX_CONCURRENT_FETCHES
environmentVariables.description: Max parallel fetches in batch operations

environmentVariables.name: MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH
environmentVariables.description: Max content size in characters before truncation

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, or ERROR

environmentVariables.name: USE_ALLOWLIST_MODE
environmentVariables.description: When true, only domains listed in BLOCKLIST_DOMAINS are allowed

environmentVariables.name: BLOCKLIST_DOMAINS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated domains to block (or allow in allowlist mode)

environmentVariables.name: HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: When set, starts an HTTP server on this port instead of stdio

environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token required on all HTTP requests (HTTP mode only)

environmentVariables.name: PLAYWRIGHT_PROXY
environmentVariables.description: Proxy server URL for Playwright (e.g. http://proxy.example.com:8080)
